description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet featuring a prominent Super Mario Bros. 3 theme. The front panel is mostly black with a colorful control panel, coin slots, and a large marquee at the top displaying the game's title and artwork. The left side panel is light blue with the 'Super Mario Bros. 3' logo and pixelated landscape details, while the right side panel is decorated with vibrant artwork of Mario, Princess Peach, and other characters on a checkered floor. The cabinet is framed with red trim, giving it a bold, retro appearance. The control panel includes multiple buttons and joysticks, suggesting multiplayer capability. The overall build appears sturdy, with a hard, smooth finish typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A classic upright arcade cabinet with Super Mario Bros. 3 artwork, red trim, and a colorful control panel. Features detailed side graphics and a prominent marquee.
description_view_0: Front view shows the marquee, control panel with buttons and joysticks, and coin slots below.
description_view_1: Left side view displays the 'Super Mario Bros. 3' logo and pixelated landscape on a light blue background.
description_view_2: Rear view is plain black with red trim, showing no artwork or interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view features large, colorful artwork of Mario, Princess Peach, and other characters on a checkered floor.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with visible bezel
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of controls with joysticks and multiple round buttons, arranged for side-by-side multiplayer play, with colorful artwork on the panel
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Super Mario Bros. 3' logo in yellow and blue with Mario and other characters, matching the game's theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Left side has 'Super Mario Bros. 3' logo and pixel landscape on blue; right side features large, colorful Mario and character artwork on a checkered floor
